prompt: Based on the uploaded screenshot of my X profile, generate a hyper-realistic 3D Twitter/X profile interface illustration, slightly tilted, with a clean and simple background in minimalist grey. The original avatar remains unchanged. The profile interface perfectly matches a real X screenshot. At the right edge of the screen, based on the person in the uploaded avatar, he is breaking through torn paper. His facial features are identical (no changes to the face), but he now has a natural radiant smile, expressive eyes, and softly glowing skin. He is holding the torn edges of the paper, creating a dynamic 3D effect. Paper fragments are flying, creating a realistic illusion of breaking through. The lighting is soft studio lighting with cinematic shadows and depth of field. Ultra-detailed, 4K, a blend of realistic and Pixar styles, sharp focus. Important notes: - Do not change the avatar (DP) - Maintain the exact same X interface layout and text style - Maintain their original identity - Only enhance the expression to a natural smile - Aspect ratio 9:16
